raw.subject: Something I noticed about Fresh Fade Barbershop
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed you've been creating a buzz in Nashville with your popular events! The energy around your shop is palpable, and I'm curious about what drives your community engagement.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential customers struggling to find your hours or menu online. As a local business, having a simple online presence can make all the difference in getting more bookings and calls.

I sketched out a quick idea for a homepage that incorporates your Facebook photos and posts, showcasing your menu hero, hours block, photo gallery, and map & directions. Take a look:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/fresh-fade-barbershop-nashville

If you're interested in learning more about how a simple online presence can support your business, I'd be happy to discuss details with you. I offer a flat fee for local businesses looking to get started.
